name: Isadora Pinzer
title: Interior Designer
summary: Looking to contribute to a progressive interior design or architectural firm where I can apply my creative design and technical rendering skills. Working alongside multidisciplinary teams, I am dedicated to crafting intentional, human-centric spaces that thoughtfully connect interior architecture, environmental psychology, and sustainability. Using 3D rendering and visualization allows me to effectively communicate ideas and bring these design concepts to life.

education.detail: BFA in Interior Architecture. Relevant courses: Studios (Residential, Hospitality, Office, Healthcare), Building Codes, Rendering, and Lighting.
Danish Institute for Study Abroad. Exhibition/Cultural Studio, Detailing and Sustainability, History of Danish Architecture, Danish Language and Culture.
Participated in Concert Choir, audition-only Treble Choir, and Drama Guild.

points: Coordinate multiple projects across residential, hospitality, healthcare, academic, commercial, and affordable housing sectors.

Assist with site visits to document existing conditions, monitor construction, and oversee drapery installations, while supporting client meetings with interactive Enscape walkthroughs of new home builds.
Produce technical documentation, including finish schedules, reflected ceiling plans, lighting and plumbing schedules, and interior millwork and trim details.
Utilizing Revit, Enscape, Rendair AI, and Adobe Creative Suite to produce design drawings, 3D renderings, and polished layouts for proposals, client meetings, and marketing.
Support FF&E processes by assisting with specification, quoting, and procurement, while maintaining the material library, ordering samples, and coordinating biweekly vendor presentations.

experience.place: LYF (LaGrasse Yanowitz & Feyl) Architects, Andover, MA
points: Contributed to diverse projects, including multi-family, high-rise, corporate, hospitality, and residential environments.
Produced detailed construction documents and realistic 3D renderings utilizing Revit, AutoCAD, Enscape, and Bluebeam.
Supported architectural phases, including site planning, exterior window placement, and structural documentation.

experience.place: A. Lee Interior Design, Derry, NH
points: Conducted client consultations across New England to determine design goals, solve spatial issues, and document measurements.
Managed diverse projects, including residential kitchen/bath remodels, new construction, and small commercial spaces.
Acquired proficiency and utilized Chief Architect to prepare CAD drawings.

other: Semi-Finalist in 2022 IES Fixture Design Competition
Rendering featured in Endicott College Spring 2021 Student Invitational
President of Endicott Percussion Ensemble, Fall 2020 - Spring 2023
President of Endicott Percussion Ensemble, Fall 2023 - Spring 2024
